description: Archived V1.34 P4 (HostToolExecutor) plan per Profile B. Required 3 QC waves + 2 fix waves + 1 doc fix.

qa: Pass w/ notes — 26 hermetic tests + 178 lib tests pass; DF-47 OPEN in tracker; multi-field patch atomicity deferred to V1.34+ (V1.34 预发布 single-process SQLite 风险可控)
